hero.title: Trusted New Jersey Real Estate
hero.subtitle: Full-service residential and commercial brokerage serving Central and Northern New Jersey. Multilingual agents. Personalized service. Three decades of expertise.

services.heading: What We Offer
services.lead: Whether you're searching for a single family home, condo, commercial property, or vacant lot, our agents provide customized service to ensure a timely sale or purchase at the best price.

about.heading: About Chen Realty
about.body: Established in 1989, Chen Realty is a full-service residential and commercial real estate brokerage firm servicing Central and Northern New Jersey. With over 20 agents with extensive industry training and expertise, we guarantee to be a trustworthy and knowledgeable resource to guide you through the buying, renting, or selling process.

educational.label: Real Estate ABC's — Home Buying Guide
